query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: An extreme macro photograph of an illuminated digital display screen revealing a tight diagonal grid of red, green, and blue subpixels, with gradual shifts between dark and brightly lit areas creating undulating variations across the patterned surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract, intentionally blurred image displayed on a digital screen, captured at extreme magnification to reveal the underlying diagonal grid of red, green, and blue subpixels; the dreamlike, unfocused content renders the subject unrecognizable, dissolving into a textured mosaic of colored light that prioritizes formal pattern over clear representation.
